title: CretSMP
description:
SMP modpack with some usefull mods for minecraft gameplay, like Create Mod, Immersive AirCraft and Traveler's Backpacks
!!!DISCONTINOUED!!!
body:
!!!DISCONTINOUED!!! (files lost)

ModPack made for Minecraft modded SMP's. 

Contents Create Mod, Immersive Aircraft, Immersive Armors, Backpacks, Simple Voice Chat, Oreganized, some addons for create mod, some upgraded structures and some quality of life mods...

Quality of life mods: Zoomify, controlify, Continuity, Mouse Tweaks, Shulker Box Tooltip, Trinkets and Xaero's Minimap and World Map
